_comment: MCP servers Koda connects to. Copy to ~/.koda/mcp-servers.json and enable the ones you want. Paths use $ENV_VAR placeholders resolved at runtime from ~/.koda/.env — this lets you commit the file structure without leaking paths.

_example_gmail._comment: Example: Gmail MCP. Uncomment and set GMAIL_MCP_PYTHON + GMAIL_MCP_PATH in ~/.koda/.env

_example_airtable._comment: Example: Airtable MCP. Uncomment if you use Airtable.

_example_context7._comment: Example: Context7 (live library docs). No setup required, just uncomment to enable.
